channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cyberattack hits Japan Airlines, delaying flights for holiday travelers
item.description: Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Network problems delay flights at two oneworld Alliance airlines
item.description: IT problems struck flights at two oneworld Alliance member airlines this week, leading to delays and flight cancellations. Network equipment connecting internal and external systems at Japan Airlines (JAL) malfunctioned early on Dec.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The life-changing benefits of Apple's Personal Voice and Live Speech
item.description: When speaking becomes physically challenging, you can preserve your unique voice using Apple's Personal Voice and Live Speech technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: Finland’s prime minister says authorities are investigating an interruption in a power cable under the Baltic Sea between his country and Estonia.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump brings Silicon Valley to Washington
item.description: Silicon Valley is coming to Washington in force, as tech leaders take on prominent roles — both official and unofficial — in President-elect Trump’s second term.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Hackers are tricking victims into scam-yourself attacks with fake tutorials, CAPTCHAs, and updates
item.description: Report uncovers rising cyber threats with alarming increases in ransomware, data-stealing malware, and sophisticated social engineering tactics.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Python in 2024: Faster, more powerful, and more popular than ever
item.description: Over the course of 2024, Python has proven again and again why it’s one of the most popular, useful, and promising programming languages out there.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Homeland Security launches internal AI chatbot for 19,000 staff
item.description: The tool, called DHSChat, will be available to approximately 19,000 employees at DHS headquarters and select pilot users across ten operating agencies.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Baby mammoth preserved for 50,000 years is unveiled in Russia's Siberia
item.description: The 50,000-year-old remains of a baby mammoth uncovered by melting permafrost have been unveiled to the public by researchers in Russia’s Siberia region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The AI backlash couldn’t have come at a better time
item.description: At a developers conference I attended not too long ago, attendees did little to hide their disdain every time the term “AI” was bandied about.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How digital transformation is reshaping energy systems
item.description: A balanced planet requires more energy with less carbon. The energy transition to a lower carbon future is arguably the largest and most significant challenge ever contemplated or attempted in the history of our planet.
item.dc:creator: Rakesh Jaggi, Fast Company

item.title: Ford to donate $1M, fleet of vehicles to Trump inauguration
item.description: Ford Motor Co. said it will donate $1 million and a small fleet of vehicles for use in President-elect Trump’s inauguration, multiple outlets reported Monday. Ford joins a recent wave of major tech companies that have pledged hefty donations to the incoming president’s inaugural fund.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: Tech expert warns of device that disables Wi-Fi cameras
item.description: It just takes a flick of a switch, and it can make your Wi-Fi camera stop working and miss the crucial video you need.
item.dc:creator: Elena Cousino, NewsNation

item.title: Scammers exploited mom’s fears to steal her entire life's savings
item.description: Rising elder scams: How to recognize them and protect yourself and your loved ones. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you outsmart the scammers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Albania bans TikTok for a year following death of teenager
item.description: Albania’s prime minister said the country will be banning TikTok for one year, citing violence and bullying among children after a teenager died.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe aims to fly closer to the sun like never before
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A NASA spacecraft aims to fly closer to the sun than any object sent before. The Parker Solar Probe was launched in 2018 to get a close-up look at the sun. Since then, it has flown straight through the sun's corona: the outer atmosphere visible during a total solar eclipse.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Albania to close TikTok for a year blaming it for promoting violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — Albania's prime minister said Saturday the government will shut down the video service TikTok for one year, blaming it for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Musk says he'll fund 'moderate' Democratic primary challengers
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk on Thursday claimed he will fund moderate primary challenges to incumbent Democrats in heavy-blue districts around the country.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Never need an EV charging station again with these rooftop solar power panels
item.description: An inventor designed rooftop solar panels for a Tesla that draws solar energy while the car is parked, adding travel mileage without plugging in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5
